entities.name: Careerspan
entities.context: V's company focused on voice-first, asynchronous interviewing as hiring solution

entities.name: AI-driven automation
entities.context: Automation of application materials that destroys traditional signal value

entities.name: Signal destruction
entities.context: Collapse of information value when production cost of quality signals drops to near zero

entities.name: Lemon problem
entities.context: Information economics concept explaining why cheap-to-produce signals lose differentiating power

entities.name: Asynchronous unscripted dialogue
entities.context: High-bandwidth evaluation method resistant to AI spoofing, proposed as new primary threshold

entities.name: Voice-first interviewing
entities.context: Careerspan's approach using voice as mandatory filter due to difficulty of AI spoofing

entities.name: High-entropy channels
entities.context: Evaluation channels that are computationally expensive or psychologically difficult to spoof

entities.name: ATS-first hiring model
entities.context: Traditional keyword-matching hiring approach becoming obsolete

entities.name: Candidate authenticity
entities.context: The authentic truth about candidates that traditional signals can no longer reveal

entities.name: ATS
entities.context: Applicant Tracking System - traditional keyword-matching hiring software

entities.name: Generative models
entities.context: AI systems that make producing high-quality application materials near-zero cost

relationships.context: Automation causes collapse of traditional resume/cover letter signal value
Signal collapse necessitates shift to unscripted dialogue as evaluation threshold
Information economics framework that explains why signal value collapses
High-entropy channels resist spoofing by current generative models
Validates voice-first approach as mandatory filter, not just efficiency gain
Voice is a high-bandwidth channel difficult to spoof
Traditional model relies on keyword-matching software
Unscripted dialogue uncovers authentic candidate truth
